name: Grass Cutter
author: Poki
description: Grass Cutter is a simulation game where you trim endless fields of grass and turn it into profit! Start small with your trusty scissors and backpack, then walk around cutting every patch you see. Sell your freshly cut grass for coins and upgrade your tools to cover more ground faster. Explore new areas, unlock better gear, and become the ultimate lawn-cutting pro! Grab your scissors and start mowing today! How to play Grass Cutter? Use WASD, arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Grass Cutter? Grass Cutter is created by Kodachi Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Grass Cutter for free? You can play Grass Cutter for free on Poki. Can I play Grass Cutter on mobile devices and desktop? Grass Cutter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
